fixtures.name: cjs-module-exports-function
fixtures.summary: CJS package sets its exported value to a callable; ESM/TS app default-imports and calls it.

fixtures.name: cjs-exports-mutation
fixtures.summary: CJS package mutates named and default export properties; app reads both via default and namespace.

fixtures.name: cjs-exports-rebind-negative
fixtures.summary: Bare assignment to the CJS exports alias does not replace the module's exported object (Node semantics). The shadowing rebind is observable as a no-op; the exported object retains its original-or-mutated value.

fixtures.name: cjs-requires-json-runtime
fixtures.summary: CJS package require()s a sibling JSON file and re-exports its data; app reads the value through the package default.

fixtures.name: esm-imports-cjs-default-runtime
fixtures.summary: ESM app imports a CJS package by default; default-binding is the CJS exported value.

fixtures.name: esm-imports-cjs-named-runtime
fixtures.summary: ESM app imports named bindings from a CJS package. Named bindings work when the CJS module assigns statically analyzable export property names; computed property names are not lifted to named bindings.

fixtures.name: package-self-reference-runtime
fixtures.summary: Package imports itself by its declared name and the resolved entry is the same module that consumers see; identity is preserved through createRequire.

fixtures.name: imports-alias-runtime
fixtures.summary: Package declares an `imports` map with a `#internal` alias; the package's own modules can require/import the alias and resolve to the documented file at runtime.

fixtures.name: exports-import-require-dual-runtime-esm
fixtures.summary: Package declares `exports: { '.': { import: ..., require: ... } }`. ESM app must observe the `import` branch entry.

fixtures.name: exports-import-require-dual-runtime-cjs
fixtures.summary: Same package, accessed through createRequire under Program Mode. The CJS-path branch must observe the `require` entry.

fixtures.name: module-create-require-runtime
fixtures.summary: App uses `createRequire` from `node:module` to require a sibling JSON file and a sealed package subpath, and to call `require.resolve` for a sealed module.

fixtures.name: dirname-filename-runtime
fixtures.summary: CJS package observes __dirname and __filename and re-exports tail-segment matches; behavior is preserved after packaging outside the checkout. Reading sibling assets via fs.readFileSync is exercised by the fs-sync fixture.

fixtures.name: fs-sync-package-asset-runtime
fixtures.summary: CJS package uses `fs.readFileSync`, `fs.existsSync`, and `fs.statSync` to read a sibling asset. The shim is wired against `globalThis.__sloppy_program_assets`; until the compiler bakes sealed package assets into that map, sync reads throw `SLOPPY_E_NODE_SYNC_FS_UNSEALED`. The fixture asserts the documented diagnostic until asset baking lands.

fixtures.name: buffer-runtime
fixtures.summary: Exercises Buffer.from for utf8, base64, and hex; Buffer.concat; Buffer.byteLength.
fixtures.expectedStdout: buffer: utf8=hello byteLen=5 hex=68656c6c6f base64=aGVsbG8= concat=abcdef

fixtures.name: stream-runtime
fixtures.summary: Exercises Readable.from over an array and PassThrough, draining to text. Stream backpressure and Transform are out of scope and not asserted.

fixtures.name: zlib-runtime
fixtures.summary: Exercises async node:zlib.gzip and gunzip via the callback API. Sync zlib APIs and deflate/inflate are documented unsupported.

negative.name: neg-native-addon
negative.summary: App imports a package with a `.node` main; compiler must reject as native addon.

negative.name: neg-child-process
negative.summary: App imports `node:child_process`; compiler must reject as unsupported Node builtin.

negative.name: neg-computed-require-unsealed
negative.summary: App calls require() with a computed specifier that is not covered by `moduleInclude`; runtime throws SLOPPY_E_MODULE_NOT_FOUND.

negative.name: neg-missing-package-asset
negative.summary: App requests a packaged asset that is not declared via assetInclude/package.json files; sync read throws SLOPPY_E_NODE_SYNC_FS_UNSEALED.

negative.name: neg-create-require-unknown
negative.summary: createRequire(import.meta.url) then require("no-such-pkg") for a package that is not in the sealed graph; runtime throws SLOPPY_E_MODULE_NOT_FOUND.

negative.name: neg-fs-sync-outside-policy
negative.summary: fs.readFileSync against a path outside the sealed package asset policy; runtime throws SLOPPY_E_NODE_SYNC_FS_UNSEALED.
